original_image_tags: A blue rectangular label on the top left reads "DECLASSIFIED" with "Authority: NND 917033" below. A dark stamped "SECRET" appears at the top center. Handwritten notes are in blue ink across the center of the page. A smaller index card (Exhibit #529) is taped onto the main page. At the bottom center, another dark stamped "SECRET" appears next to a red stamped date "22 MAR 1949". A handwritten note "Inc'l" is on the bottom left. A "Best Possible Image" blue label is on the bottom left edge. A dark "SECRET" stamp is partially visible at the bottom. A blue "MARARY LISTS" tab label is on the right edge. The bottom right has handwritten numbers "5-20300".

elements.description: A blue rectangular 'DECLASSIFIED' label with the text 'Authority: NND 917033'. A faint 'SECRET' stamp is visible above it. Handwritten text 'Endorsed to R/S-S 02378 of 3-9-49', 'Incident Summary Sheets', and '173-233 Inc.' are present. A typed index card is attached, featuring 'EXHIBIT #529', 'Hq'd Air Material Command Dayton', 'Subject: Transmittal of Incident Summary Sheets 173 thru 233.', 'REPORT FILED M-5', 'AIRCRAFT - UNIDENTIFIED', 'JONES', '2-27-50', and a 'SECRET' stamp. Vertical handwritten text 'CATALOG' and a dark rectangular stamp with text 'LIAISON FILE COPY' are on the right. At the bottom, 'SECRET' is stamped twice, '2 2 MAR 1949' is stamped, 'Best Possible Image' is in a blue bar, and '5-20300' is handwritten.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific text on the index card (e.g., 'Hq'd Air Material Command Dayton', 'Subject: Transmittal of Incident Summary Sheets 173 thru 233.') and additional handwritten/stamped text (e.g., 'Endorsed to R/S-S 02378 of 3-9-49', 'CATALOG', 'LIAISON FILE COPY') that Description A does not mention or quotes differently (e.g., 'Inc'l' vs 'Incident Summary Sheets'), creating contradictions on verbatim text within the visual content.
